creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2011-02-12 04:52:47 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    net/hostapd          Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    net/hostapd/files    config 
                         patch-src-l2_packet-l2_packet_freebsd.c 
  Log:
  hostapd is a user space daemon for access point and authentication
  servers. It implements IEEE 802.11 access point management, IEEE
  802.1X/WPA/WPA2/EAP Authenticators, RADIUS client, EAP server, and
  RADIUS authentication server. The current version supports Linux
  (Host AP, madwifi, mac80211-based drivers) and FreeBSD (net80211).
  
  WWW: http://hostap.epitest.fi/hostapd/
  
  PR:             ports/154621
  Submitted by:   leres at ee.lbl.gov
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2313    +1 -0      ports/net/Makefile
  1.1       +43 -0     ports/net/hostapd/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/net/hostapd/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +175 -0    ports/net/hostapd/files/config (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/net/hostapd/files/patch-src-l2_packet-l2_packet_freebsd.c (new)
  1.1       +13 -0     ports/net/hostapd/pkg-descr (new)
